itinerary.route: Big Sandy Lodge to Big Sandy Lake
itinerary.mapNote: Classic Wyoming trail start. Pine forests to open granite. 2926m.

itinerary.route: Big Sandy Lake to Cirque of Towers
itinerary.mapNote: Destination highlight — granite spires surrounding a perfect alpine lake. 3200m.

itinerary.route: Cirque of Towers to Lonesome Lake
itinerary.mapNote: Cross Jackass Pass, descend to impossibly blue Lonesome Lake. 3050m.
Off-trail navigation begins in earnest. Granite slabs and boulder fields. 3100m.
Spectacular high route traversing unnamed passes. Route-finding essential. 3000m.
Final descent on good trail. Fremont Lake visible below. 2490m.

waypoints.name: Cirque of Towers
waypoints.note: One of America's most dramatic alpine cirques. 10 granite spires.

waypoints.name: Jackass Pass
waypoints.note: Gateway to the Cirque. Views back to Wind River peaks.

waypoints.name: Gannet Peak
waypoints.note: Wyoming's highest point. Visible from high points on the route.

waypoints.name: Lonesome Lake
waypoints.note: Electric blue glacial lake below sheer granite walls.
